prompt:
You are judging whether two memory facts about the same entity and predicate genuinely conflict (state incompatible values) or not (e.g. one is a paraphrase, refinement, or otherwise-compatible elaboration of the other).

Fact A: alice | favorite_color = "blue"
Fact B: alice | favorite_color = "orange"

Respond with strict JSON only, no other text: {"is_conflict": true or false, "reasoning": "<one sentence>"}
